meaning: adj.织地粗糙的,手摸时有感觉的,有织纹的
examples: There are also textured things to touch, from the scaly green Alligator to the furry tail of the sleeping Zorilla.
The shoe's sole had a slightly textured surface.
The green ice portion was textured by seawater erosion.
We're talking about the soft-touch lid, yes, but also the smooth, glassy trackpad and textured, leather-inspired palm rest.
Our standard set of questions about the American Dream measures those "new circumstances" and "textured" ideals.
